name: Andrew Santino
bio: Andrew Santino is an American stand-up comedian and actor who hosts the interview podcast Whiskey Ginger and co-hosts Bad Friends with Bobby Lee. As an actor he has appeared in series including Dave, Beef, and Im Dying Up Here. His stand-up specials include the Showtime special Home Field Advantage (2017) and the Netflix special Cheeseburger (2023).

timeline.ev: Releases Showtime special Home Field Advantage
Begins co-hosting Bad Friends with Bobby Lee

bits.t: A message for VP Kamala Harris
